---
title: "Factores que predicen la expectativa media"
author: "Kenny Fang, Sebastián Rocha, Juan Pablo Salcedo, Catalina Sandoval"
date: "2026-05-07"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## holaa
```{r}
library(readxl)
base <- read_excel("C:/Users/marim/Downloads/LifeExpectancyData.xlsx")
names(base) <- trimws(names(base))
names(base) <- make.names(names(base))
set.seed(2025)
#muestra <- base[sample(seq_len(nrow(base)), size = 300, replace = FALSE), ]
#muestra <- base[ sample((nrow(base)), size=300, replace = FALSE), ]
base
```
